summary: Executed backend + frontend validation for Configurador de Stock Rápido. Core catalog, BOM recommendation, sticky summary behavior, WhatsApp review selection, and enable/disable confirm logic are working on preview.

minor.issue: Public preview ingress does not expose backend health JSON directly; public backend checks require /api-prefixed routes.

action_items: Optional: align health-check exposure with ingress strategy (either document /health as internal-only or expose /api/health publicly).
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code defects found in reviewed reference files for the tested scope.
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and testable data-testid coverage is strong for interactive controls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI flow validated on https://network-bom-tool.preview.emergentagent.com including item toggle inside WhatsApp review drawer and confirm-button disable logic when no items are selected.
rca of the issue: Reported WhatsApp selection bug appears resolved by introducing OrderReviewDrawer item toggles and selectedCount-based confirm disable guard. Reproduced intended behavior: deselect all => confirm disabled; select at least one => confirm enabled; final action opens WhatsApp URL with encoded message.
